title: Ophrys vanbruggeniana

Within the genus Ophrys, it is often grouped with other species of bearded orchids. These orchids are known for their unique appearance and ability to mimic female insects to attract pollinators. Ophrys vanbruggeniana is a rare and endemic species within its native range.
